## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Image-quality improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test-only change
- [ ] Maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `dart format lib test integration_test`.
- [ ] I ran `flutter analyze`.
- [ ] I ran `flutter test`.
- [ ] I updated docs for behavior changes.
- [ ] I added or updated tests.
- [ ] I included screenshots or before/after images for UI/image changes.
- [ ] I documented any new model, asset, or dependency license.

## Image Quality Notes

- Subject type tested:

- Known remaining failure cases:

Add screenshots or safe sample outputs here.
